goal: Fix header padding on Profile and Generate pages

Generate page component cards (ConsentForm, ResearchConsentForm, ConsentDocument) are automatically fixed by the Phase 1 .card border-radius change to 1rem. Build passes cleanly and TypeScript check passes.

gateVerdicts.rationale: All 3 steps had real verification: steps 1-2 used grep to confirm pb-4 mb-6 header padding changes, step 3 referenced the combined build from Phase 2 which passed with exit 0. npx tsc --noEmit also passes with zero errors.
gateVerdicts.evidence: npm run build exited 0. npx tsc --noEmit: TypeScript: No errors found. pb-4 mb-6 confirmed on profile/page.tsx:92 and generate/page.tsx:276.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was to fix header padding on Profile and Generate pages. Both pages now use consistent pb-4 mb-6 headers matching Dashboard, History, and Templates. Generate component cards are rounded-2xl via Phase 1 globals.css. Build passes confirming no regressions.
gateVerdicts.evidence: profile/page.tsx:92 pb-4 mb-6; generate/page.tsx:276 pb-4 mb-6. ConsentForm, ResearchConsentForm, ConsentDocument cards use nq-card/card which now has 1rem border-radius from globals.css.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred in Phase 3. Chat page had no standard header pattern or text-[ values; no changes needed. All UI unification work is complete across dashboard, history, templates, profile, and generate pages.
